message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle normal
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodFontStyle normal
skinparam classMethodFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodColor #4CAF50
skinparam classAttributeColor #4CAF50
skinparam classIconSize 20
skinparam classIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classIconBackgroundColor #C8E6C9
skinparam classIconBorderColor #81C784

class MediumDungeon {
    + newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
    + newMoblin() : Moblin
}

class EasyDungeon {
    + newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
    + newMoblin() : Moblin
}

class Encounter {
    + enemies : [Monster]
    + dungeon : Dungeon
    + announceEnemies()
    + moveEnemies()
}

class BlueBokoblin {
    + announce()
    + move()
    + bludgeon()
    + defend()
}

class BlueMoblin {
    + announce()
    + move()
    + stab()
    + kick()
}

class NormalBokoblin {
    + announce()
    + move()
    + bludgeon()
    + defend()
}

class NormalMoblin {
    + announce()
    + move()
    + stab()
    + kick()
}

interface Dungeon {
    + newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
    + newMoblin() : Moblin
}

interface Bokoblin {
    + bludgeon()
    + defend()
}

interface Moblin {
    + stab()
    + kick()
}

interface Monster {
    + announce()
    + move()
}

MediumDungeon ..> BlueBokoblin
MediumDungeon ..> BlueMoblin
MediumDungeon ..> NormalBokoblin
MediumDungeon ..> NormalMoblin

EasyDungeon ..> NormalBokoblin
EasyDungeon ..> NormalMoblin
EasyDungeon ..> Dungeon

Encounter o-- Dungeon
Encounter o-- Monster

BlueBokoblin ..|> Bokoblin
BlueMoblin ..|> Moblin
NormalBokoblin ..|> Bokoblin
NormalMoblin ..|> Moblin

Dungeon ..> Bokoblin
Dungeon ..> Moblin

Bokoblin ..|> Monster
Moblin ..|> Monster

@enduml
